section.div: I like building software that can be tested, replayed and understood when something goes wrong.
Deterministic security-engineering range for authoritative simulation, protocol hardening, evidence integrity, forensic replay, analytics, and reproducible verification.
Rust Security Sandbox Portfolio Project - Unity client integration, telemetry, evidence export, investigation database, API, and dashboard.
Rust defensive anticheat portfolio with server-auth validation, JSONL telemetry, risk scoring, CSV export, Docker demo, and GitHub Actions CI
